visual_description: The man in a dark brown leather jacket walks across the room holding a small plate of food, then approaches a round table and sits down, placing the plate on the surface. He rests his hand against his head while looking toward the table. The setting appears to be a modest eatery with simple tables, chairs, and wall posters.
